'''dashongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylopentaose|xylopentaose]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylopentaose|xylopentaose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dashongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæshengeth|dæshengeth]] || [[word:dæshengej|dæshengej]] || [[word:dæshengesh|dæshengesh]] || [[word:dæshenge|dæshenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashoshongoth|dashoshongoth]] || [[word:dashoshongoj|dashoshongoj]] || [[word:dashoshongosh|dashoshongosh]] || [[word:dashoshongo|dashoshongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashongoth|dashongoth]] || [[word:dashongoj|dashongoj]] || [[word:dashongosh|dashongosh]] || [[word:dashongo|dashongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashofngoth|dashofngoth]] || [[word:dashofngoj|dashofngoj]] || [[word:dashofngosh|dashofngosh]] || [[word:dashofngof|dashofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashongotho|dashongotho]] || [[word:dashongojo|dashongojo]] || [[word:dashongosho|dashongosho]] || [[word:dashongoko|dashongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashongoth|dashongoth]] || [[word:dashongoj|dashongoj]] || [[word:dashongosh|dashongosh]] || [[word:dashongo|dashongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashongothol|dashongothol]] || [[word:dashongojol|dashongojol]] || [[word:dashongoshol|dashongoshol]] || [[word:dashongokol|dashongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashongothotho|dashongothotho]] || [[word:dashongojojo|dashongojojo]] || [[word:dashongoshosho|dashongoshosho]] || [[word:dashongoko|dashongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashongothon|dashongothon]] || [[word:dashongojon|dashongojon]] || [[word:dashongoshon|dashongoshon]] || [[word:dashongokon|dashongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashongothoro|dashongothoro]] || [[word:dashongojoro|dashongojoro]] || [[word:dashongoshoro|dashongoshoro]] || [[word:dashongokoro|dashongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
